Built for teams who move fast

Plan together.
Build together.

10plate gives your team an infinite canvas to brainstorm ideas, organise them into groups, and present a clear plan — all in real time.

Start for free See how it works

No credit card required · Free forever plan

app.10plate.io/groups/product-team/q3-planning

User onboarding flow redesign

API rate limiting strategy

Mobile push notifications

Improve search relevance

Analytics dashboard v2

SSO / enterprise auth

Everything your team needs to plan well

From the first scattered idea to a polished, shareable plan — 10plate has you covered.

🗂️

Infinite canvas

Drop ideas onto a free-form canvas with no limits. Drag, rearrange, and organise at any scale without the constraints of a slide deck or spreadsheet.

⚡

Real-time collaboration

Every note, move, and grouping appears instantly for all teammates. No refreshing, no merge conflicts — just live shared thinking.

🧩

Smart grouping

Drag notes onto each other to cluster related ideas. Groups emerge naturally from the work, not from a rigid folder structure imposed upfront.

📽️

Built-in presentation mode

Switch from brainstorm to presentation with one click. Walk stakeholders through your organised plan without leaving the tool.

👥

Team workspaces

Organise projects inside groups — private for your core team or public for open collaboration. Invite members with a join code.

🔒

Secure by default

JWT-authenticated sessions, private groups, and role-based access mean your plans stay where you want them.

From chaos to clarity in minutes

10plate fits the way teams actually think — messy at first, structured by the end.

01

Create a workspace

Set up a group for your team — product, engineering, design, or the whole company. Keep it private or open it up for broader input.

02

Start a project

Every sprint, quarter, or initiative gets its own project. Open the canvas and start adding sticky notes — one idea per card.

03

Brainstorm together

Teammates join and drop their ideas onto the shared canvas in real time. No waiting for your turn — everyone contributes at once.

04

Group and prioritise

Drag related notes onto each other to cluster them into themes. Rearrange until the structure reflects your actual priorities.

05

Present your plan

Flip into presentation mode and walk through your organised canvas with stakeholders. The plan is already there — no extra prep needed.

Simple, honest pricing

Start free. Upgrade when your team grows. No hidden fees.

Free

$0 /free

Perfect for individuals and small teams getting started.

Get started free
  • Up to 3 projects
  • 1 group workspace
  • Unlimited sticky notes
  • Real-time collaboration
  • Presentation mode

Standard

$4.99 /per month

For growing teams who need more space and control.

Start free trial
  • Unlimited projects
  • Up to 5 group workspaces
  • Private groups with join codes
  • Guest access
  • Priority support

Pro

$9.99 /per month

Unlimited everything for organisations that run on 10plate.

Start free trial
  • Everything in Standard
  • Unlimited group workspaces
  • Advanced permissions
  • SSO / enterprise auth (coming soon)
  • Dedicated support

Your next great plan starts here

Join teams who use 10plate to turn scattered ideas into structured, shareable plans. Free to start, easy to grow.
